specific_question: What percentage of MediConn's platform modules are fully compliant with Pan-Canadian Virtual Care Policy standards by Q4 2025?
answer: 60% of MediConn's platform modules are fully compliant as of Q4 2025.
justification: The 60% compliance level reflects phased adoption of privacy and equity standards under the federal virtual-care framework.
dr_question: Which IT modernization efforts should MediConn emphasize to stay aligned with national virtual care standards and shared digital health infrastructure by 2026?
